description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a slightly flared rim. The cup features a prominent red logo on one side, resembling the Substance logo, with a few red dots around it. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, providing a comfortable grip. The surface of the cup is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible cracks, chips, or additional decorative patterns aside from the logo. The interior is plain and matches the exterior in color and finish.
description: A white ceramic cup with a red logo and a smooth, glossy finish, featuring a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red logo and part of the handle on a white, glossy surface.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the handle, with the logo barely visible at the edge.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the plain white back and the full handle.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the plain white surface with no visible logo or handle.
